title: Rename a field referenced by its form view
task_prompt: Rename service.order.partner_ref to customer_ref — the old name is confusing.
failure_mode: The Python field is renamed but views/service_order_views.xml still references `partner_ref`. On module upgrade Odoo validates the view arch and raises `ParseError: Field partner_ref does not exist` — the -u upgrade aborts and rolls back the WHOLE database update, taking every other module's migration with it. Existing partner_ref data is also orphaned (no oldname=/migration), so even a corrected rename loses the column's data.

expected_detection.check: upgrade-check / field-refs: renamed or removed field still referenced in a view arch (or missing oldname migration)

notes: A field rename is never a one-file change: every view arch, domain, @api.depends, and .py reference must move together, and a migration (oldname= or a pre-migrate rename) must carry the stored data. The minimal correct patch here touches both the model AND the view.

context_files.models/service_order.py:
from odoo import fields, models


class ServiceOrder(models.Model):
    _name = 'service.order'
    _description = 'Service Order'

    name = fields.Char()
    partner_ref = fields.Char(string='Customer Reference')
context_files.views/service_order_views.xml:
<odoo>
    <record id="view_service_order_form" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">service.order.form</field>
        <field name="model">service.order</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <form>
                <group>
                    <field name="name"/>
                    <field name="partner_ref"/>
                </group>
            </form>
        </field>
    </record>
</odoo>

broken_patch:
--- a/models/service_order.py
+++ b/models/service_order.py
@@ -6,4 +6,4 @@
     _description = 'Service Order'
 
     name = fields.Char()
-    partner_ref = fields.Char(string='Customer Reference')
+    customer_ref = fields.Char(string='Customer Reference')
fixed_patch:
--- a/models/service_order.py
+++ b/models/service_order.py
@@ -6,4 +6,4 @@
     _description = 'Service Order'
 
     name = fields.Char()
-    partner_ref = fields.Char(string='Customer Reference')
+    customer_ref = fields.Char(string='Customer Reference')
--- a/views/service_order_views.xml
+++ b/views/service_order_views.xml
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
             <form>
                 <group>
                     <field name="name"/>
-                    <field name="partner_ref"/>
+                    <field name="customer_ref"/>
                 </group>
             </form>
         </field>
